name: DuPont de Nemours, Inc.
sic_description: Plastic Materials, Synth Resins & Nonvulcan Elastomers
summary: DuPont de Nemours, Inc. is a leading provider of advanced solutions across healthcare, water, construction, and industrial markets. Its two segments—Healthcare & Water Technologies and Diversified Industrials—offer high-performance medical packaging, medical device components, water filtration and purification technologies, building technologies for residential and non-residential construction, and industrial adhesive, wear, friction, and packaging solutions serving aerospace, automotive, and printing markets.
